content:
===BEGIN===
After years of mixing potions and reading dusty books, I finally found the secret to living forever! I was so excited, thinking about all the adventures I could have without ever growing old. But just as I celebrated, a shadow appeared. It was Death, dressed in a black cloak, holding out a tiny business card.

“When you realize living forever sucks,” Death said with a smile, “call this number. I’ve got a job offer for you.”

I took the card and looked at it closely. The idea of living forever sounded fun, but what if it got boring? Would I miss my friends or family? Death didn’t seem scary at all—he seemed kind of funny!

Maybe when I’m ready, I’ll call that number. But for now, I think I’ll enjoy being young and just keep dreaming about adventures—because forever is a really, really long time!
